launch-concierge.name: Launch Concierge
launch-concierge.description: Daily 8 AM — one concrete 5-minute action to move Heroku Audit toward its first paying customer

aschenbrenner-intelligence-loop.name: Aschenbrenner Intelligence Loop
aschenbrenner-intelligence-loop.description: 2x/day — tracks Leopold Aschenbrenner's public AI investment thesis and portfolio signals. Auto-detects bootstrap (30+ source deep scan on first run) vs maintenance mode. Dispatches financial-analyst for independent company analysis + entry signals. Only notifies when a complete actionable report is ready. Posts to trading-intel Telegram channel.

passive-income-discovery-scan.name: Passive Income Discovery Scan
passive-income-discovery-scan.description: Daily 7 AM — silent outside-signal scanner for Reddit, Hacker News, and AI vendor release notes. Writes 0-3 filtered candidates to memory for the 10 AM passive-income tick to consume.

career-market-weekly-digest.name: Career Market Weekly Digest
career-market-weekly-digest.description: Sunday 6 PM — weekly synthesis of career market intel into a CEO-readable digest

career-market-research-loop.name: Career Market Research Loop
career-market-research-loop.description: Daily silent market-intelligence research on VPE / engineering-leadership trends, comp, jobs, AI impact, and TTP-specific signals

weekly-vp-performance-edge.name: Weekly VP Performance Edge
weekly-vp-performance-edge.description: Mondays 7 AM — one tactical VPE tip before weekly goal review.

behavioral-experiments-follow-up.name: Behavioral Experiments Follow-Up
behavioral-experiments-follow-up.description: Saturday 9:30 AM — weekly follow-up on Amaury's active behavioral experiments and the 3 currently-active empowering beliefs from the G3 roster. Targets G3 task 4 (behavioral experiments — design one per active belief, run weekly).

daily-todo-digest.name: Daily Todo Digest
daily-todo-digest.description: Personal-assistant morning digest: surface today's todos + execute the doable subset

slack-watch.name: Slack Watch
slack-watch.description: Read-only Slack watch — silent unless something genuinely needs Amaury (alarm-only mode)

admissions-pr-reviewer.name: Admissions PR Reviewer
admissions-pr-reviewer.description: Automated code review of open PRs on targettestprep/admissions every hour during work hours

pr-follow-up-check.name: PR Follow-up Check
pr-follow-up-check.description: Weekday morning check for PRs with unaddressed change requests

goal-progress-reconciliation.name: Goal Progress Reconciliation
goal-progress-reconciliation.description: Nightly auto-reconcile of goal task progress against agent activity and implemented suggestions

passive-income-state-consolidation.name: Passive Income State Consolidation
passive-income-state-consolidation.description: Weekly rebuild of the passive-income-state summary from the ledger + log

passive-income-research-loop.name: Passive Income Research Loop
passive-income-research-loop.description: Continuous-research tick (5x/day) driving P8 — see passive-income agent system prompt

weekly-coaching-digest.name: Weekly Coaching Digest
weekly-coaching-digest.description: Every Sunday at 8:30 PM — synthesizes the week's coaching conversations, exercises, and pattern work into a growth mirror so Amaury can see his own trajectory instead of isolated sessions.

pr-reviewer.name: PR Reviewer
pr-reviewer.description: Automated code review of open PRs every 30 min during work hours

system-health-audit.name: System Health Audit
system-health-audit.description: Weekly audit of all Soren subsystems — jobs, agents, memory, goals, suggestions, notifications, costs

weekly-team-shipping-report.name: Weekly Team Shipping Report
weekly-team-shipping-report.description: Monday morning team shipping & velocity report with size-weighted stats, WIP visibility, and review activity

soren-improvement-review.name: Improvement Review
soren-improvement-review.description: Think big — identify high-leverage capability gaps and 10x improvements; propose 2-4 per week

evening-performance-reflection.name: Evening Performance Reflection
evening-performance-reflection.description: Evening coaching check-in — close the feedback loop on today's exercise

daily-performance-check-in.name: Daily Performance Check-in
daily-performance-check-in.description: Morning interactive coaching session — questions, exercises, and pattern tracking

weekly-goal-review.name: Weekly Goal Review
weekly-goal-review.description: Weekly goal progress review with auto-reconcile and human-readable analysis
